title: Random Entity & Structure
description: Let the random entity or structure will be generated at the player’s location!
body:
Random entities and structure will be generated at the player’s location.

# Entities
Random entities will be generated at the player’s location every 40 seconds.
### Supported entities：
Allay, Armadillo, Armor Stand, Axolotl, Bee, Blaze, Bogged, Breeze, Camel, Cat, Cave Spider, Chicken, Cod, Cow, Creeper, Dolphin, Donkey, Drowned, Elder Guardian, Enderman, Endermite, Evoker, Fox, Frog, Ghast, Giant, Glow Squid, Goat, Guardian, Hoglin, Horse, Husk, Illusioner, Iron Golem, Llama, Magma Cube, Mooshroom, Mule, Ocelot, Panda, Parrot, Phantom, Pig, Piglin, Piglin Brute, Pillager, Polar Bear, Pufferfish, Rabbit, Ravager, Salmon, Sheep, Shulker, Silverfish, Skeleton, Skeleton Horse, Slime, Sniffer, Snow Golem, Spider, Squid, Stray, Strider, Tadpole, Trader Llama, Tropical Fish, Turtle, Vex, Villager, Vindicator, Wandering Trader, Warden, Witch, Zombie Villager, Wither Skeleton, Wolf, Zoglin, Zombie, Zombie Horse, Zombified Piglin, Experience Bottle, Egg, Arrow, Firework Rocket, Shulker Bullet, Snowball, Spectral Arrow, Trident, Wind Charge, Boat, Chest Minecart, Command Block Minecart, Minecart, Tnt Minecart, Chest Boat, End Crystal, Evoker Fangs, Lightning Bolt


# Structure
Random structures will be generated at the player’s location every 7 minutes.
### Supported structure：
Jungle Pyramid, Village Plains, Village Taiga, End City, Ruined Portal, Igloo, Stronghold, Bastion Remnant, Desert Pyramid, Buried Treasure, Nether Fossil, Mansion, Shipwreck, Monument, Swamp Hut, Fortress, Pillager Outpost, Mineshaft, Ancient City, Trail Ruins, Trial Chambers
